questions.clue:
[IMAGE CLUE]
(Alex delivers the clue from Yad Vashem, Israel.) At Yad Vashem, which is the Jewish people's living memorial to the Holocaust, the monument to Jewish resistance fighters forms this national symbol

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Alex shows us a large stone in Yad Vashem, Israel.) This stone comes from the central synagogue in Aachen, Germany, which was destroyed on November 9, 1938, in what became known as Kristallnacht, the Night of the Broken this

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Alex walks in front of the Wall of Remembrance in Yad Vashem, Israel.) Both the valiant uprising against the Nazis & the final deportation are depicted here in the Wall of Remembrance to this city's ghetto, which at one time held more than 400,000 people in just 1.3 square miles

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Alex walks among lush green vegetation at Yad Vashem, Israel.) Symbolic of the renewal of life, trees line the avenue honoring those who risked their lives to help save the Jews; they are known as this noble word "Among the Nations"

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Alex walks through the Valley of the Communities at Yad Vashem.) The Valley of the Communities is a labyrinth of great walls with the names of over 5,000 communities, most of which no longer exist; now the architects were inspired by this biblical prophet's vision of the Valley of the Dry Bones
A method of assigning letter grades based on rank among the class is called "grading on" this
The U.S. is facing a shortage of teachers of this subject--where are the new Jaime Escalantes?
NASET is the "National Association of" these "Teachers", who may work with the gifted as well as the disabled
This term for a list of items to be covered in a course is from the Greek for "parchment label"
This organization started in 1990 with 500 idealistic young people working in schools in low-income communities
Nutation is the bobbing motion of a spinning rigid body; this toy is the classic example
When a tree's tissues are replaced by quartz, you get this type of wood, also a synonym for "frightened"

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Sarah of the Clue Crew performs a science demonstration.) You'd expect the paper to fly up when extreme pressure is applied, but instead... the wood breaks; air couldn't flow in quickly enough between the paper, the wood & the table, so a partial this 6-letter term was formed
The Schottky effect is a type of increase in the discharge of these subatomic particles from a heated surface

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Sarah of the Clue Crew shows an animation on the monitor.) Glucose & fructose are monosaccharides; by removing a molecule of water, the two join to form this disaccharide, also known as table sugar
"The Wacktastic Adventures of Mulder & Scully"
"Where's the Electricity?!: The Laura Ingalls Story"
"Lieutenant Van Buren"--the show should have been just about her
"That Gabe Kaplan '70s Show"
"Drs. Weaver, Lockhart & Rasgotra, Medicine Women of Chicago"
He explained his "Decision Points" in the 2010 book of that name
He felt his "Brief History of Time" left unanswered questions, so he came up with "The Grand Design" to answer them
The second book in a bestselling trilogy is "The Girl Who Played with" this
In 2010 this political daughter took readers behind the scenes of the campaign trail in "Dirty Sexy Politics"
After revealing "The Secret", she gave us "The Power"
Drop a letter from the language spoken by the people of Seoul to get this sacred text of Islam

[IMAGE CLUE]
...from a type of mediator to get this implanted device visible in the chest X-ray seen here
...from a word for a mechanical man to get this verb that means "to cheer on"
...from a word for a long, vehement speech to get this synonym for "swap"
...from a slat on a window to get this word for a paramour

final.clue: After the death in combat of the previous king, he became the last one to win the crown while on the battlefield
